member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Watchlist.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.HomeRowMaxItems
member.summary: Maximum items shown in the home-screen row.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Watchlist.HomeSection.SectionPayload
member.summary: Mirrors Jellyfin.Plugin.HomeScreenSections.Model.Dto.HomeScreenSectionPayload. HSS deserialises into whatever type the handler method signature declares — no compile-time reference to the HSS assembly is needed.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Watchlist.HomeSection.SectionRegistrar
member.summary: Registers the Watchlist home-screen row with IAmParadox27's HSS plugin, and the Watchlist tab with IAmParadox27's CustomTabs plugin — both via reflection at runtime so neither is a compile-time dependency. Runs as an IHostedService so all plugins are loaded before registration.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Watchlist.HomeSection.WatchlistSectionHandler
member.summary: Returns the user's most recently bookmarked items as a home-screen row. Invoked by the Home Screen Sections plugin via reflection.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Watchlist.Middleware.BookmarkInjectionMiddleware
member.summary: Intercepts GET /web/index.html and injects the watchlist bookmark script. Handles gzip/deflate/br compressed responses (e.g. from FileTransformation plugin).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Watchlist.Models.WatchlistStore.Entries
member.summary: userId (Guid.ToString("N")) → ordered list of watchlist entries.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Watchlist.Services.WatchlistEventConsumer
member.summary: Removes an item from the user's watchlist when Jellyfin marks it as played. Fires for both manual "mark as played" and automatic 90%-threshold detection.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Watchlist.Services.WatchlistService
member.summary: Thread-safe, JSON-backed watchlist store. One entry list per user. All mutations acquire _lock; the on-disk file is rewritten on every change.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Watchlist.Services.WatchlistService.Add(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Adds item. No-ops if already present.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Watchlist.Services.WatchlistService.Remove(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Removes item. Returns true if removed, false if not present.
